dict.string: STASH uses speech recognition to capture your thoughts hands-free when you prefer to speak instead of type.
STASH needs microphone access to record your voice when using speech-to-text for capturing thoughts.
STASH can connect health insights with your thoughts to provide personalized context and understanding.
STASH can log thoughts related to your health data to help you track wellness insights.
STASH can reference contacts in your thoughts and help you remember important interactions.
STASH can connect thoughts to calendar events and help you plan around your schedule.
STASH can attach location context to your thoughts, helping you remember where ideas occurred.
